name: Margaret Cho
bio: Margaret Cho is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer who rose to fame in the 1990s with material on race, sexuality, body image, and her Korean American upbringing. She starred in the groundbreaking but short-lived 1994 sitcom All-American Girl, then channeled that experience into her acclaimed solo show and film Im the One That I Want. She is a five-time Grammy and Emmy nominee and a longtime LGBTQ rights advocate.

timeline.ev: Stars in ABC sitcom All-American Girl
Solo show and film Im the One That I Want released
Stars in Lifetime series The Cho Show

accolades: American Comedy Award, Best Female Comedian (1993)

specials.t: Im the One That I Want
